scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const cp = require('child_process'); if (fs.existsSync('frontend/package.json')) { cp.execSync('npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend', {stdio: 'inherit'}); } else { cp.execSync('npm install && npm run build', {stdio: 'inherit'}); }"
scripts.dev: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend && node backend/server.js
